methods.name: Init
methods.description: Initialize the WebView2 control and load the date picker UI

methods.name: ShowPicker
methods.description: Show the date picker popup. Pass an initial date in MM/DD/YYYY format (or empty for today). Returns the selected date in MM/DD/YYYY format, or empty string if cancelled.

parameters.name: initialDate
parameters.description: Initial date in MM/DD/YYYY format, or empty for today

returns.description: Selected date in MM/DD/YYYY format, or empty string if cancelled

methods.name: About
methods.description: Display the About dialog with control version and information

events.name: ErrorOccurred
events.description: Fired when an error occurs during control initialization or operation

events.name: DateSelected
events.description: Fired when the user selects a date from the calendar picker
